# TurboFix

> TurboFix is an AI-assisted maintenance decision platform for manufacturing SMEs.

TurboFix helps factory maintenance teams turn paper registers, spreadsheets, PDFs, manuals, job cards, breakdown history, preventive-maintenance records, BOMs, and spare lists into structured machine knowledge. Extracted information is reviewed by people and requires Maintenance Head approval before it can influence AI recommendations.

Core capabilities:
- Machine-specific maintenance records and knowledge
- Preventive maintenance and breakdown workflows
- AI-assisted maintenance questions grounded in approved plant data
- Shutdown planning and work prioritization
- Technician work queues, evidence, and supervisor review
- WhatsApp dispatch and escalation workflows
- Exportable plant-owned records and backups

Primary audience: maintenance heads, plant managers, technicians, and owners of small and medium manufacturing businesses.

Official website: https://turbofix.co.in/
Product overview and guided demo: https://turbofix.co.in/

TurboFix supports maintenance decisions; authorized plant personnel remain responsible for safety, approvals, and execution.
